sentry.tooltip.firepower: The Mechanical Arm now possesses firepower
message.sentrymechanicalarm.invalid_pair: Invalid pair! Must link Turret <-> Fire Control.
message.sentrymechanicalarm.select_sentr: Selected Sentry. Right click target to link.
message.sentrymechanicalarm.select_fire_: Selected Fire Control. Right click target to link.
message.sentrymechanicalarm.already_on_l: You are already on the list!
message.sentrymechanicalarm.scope_not_bo: Scope not bound to a Fire Control
item.sentrymechanicalarm.fire_control_cl: SHIFT right-click to add yourself; Spyglass (main hand) + clipboard (offhand) + middle-click to mark targets remotely.
When used on a Laterano Fire Controller
Sentry Mechanical Arms controlled by this Fire Controller will only attack entities on the list.
item.sentrymechanicalarm.seventh_chamber: Who says a wheelchair can't drift on steel frames.
sentrymechanicalarm.ponder.tag.sentry.de: Arm the Mechanical Arm with powerful weapons from TacZ
sentrymechanicalarm.ponder.sentry_arm_in: The Sentry Mechanical Arm is a powerful firepower platform.
Hold a TacZ weapon and press [O] to deploy it.
Right-click with an Ammo Box to load it; Shift-Right-click to remove it.
Once connected to rotational power, it will activate and automatically target all hostile mobs.
Collects dropped items and experience into a container below, if present.
sentrymechanicalarm.ponder.sentry_arm_su: If you want the Sentry Mechanical Arm to have sustained firepower...
You need to build a logistical supply chain for it.
Mechanical Arms and Hoppers can feed ammo to the Sentry Mechanical Arm.
Mechanical Arms will automatically extract empty Ammo Boxes.
A Deployer holding ammo can reload the Ammo Box beneath it.
Thus, the Sentry Mechanical Arm receives a ceaseless stream of firepower.
sentrymechanicalarm.ponder.sentry_arm_am: To produce ammo, you first need to obtain an Ammo Template.
Place a Copper Sheet on a Depot and the ammo on a Deployer...
This creates the corresponding Ammo Template.
You need a Mechanical Saw to process the raw materials.
Place the Ammo Template in a List Filter, check 'Respect Data Attributes', and insert it into the Saw's filter slot.
Subsequent Copper Sheets will be processed into this type of Ammo Template.
By default, the Sentry Mechanical Arm only attacks hostile mobs.
Using the Fire Control Console, you can specify specific targets.
Right-click one of them with a Wrench...
This establishes a connection between them.
Use the Cross-Border Pursuit Permit with a telescope to mark targets remotely.
Deliver the Permit/List to the Fire Control Console...
The connected Sentry Mechanical Arm will then only attack mobs on that list.
sentrymechanicalarm.ponder.sentry_arm_mo: Sentry Mechanical Arms can be used on moving contraptions.
Turret rotation speed is proportional to movement speed.
Sentry Mechanical Arms will use ammunition from containers within the contraption.
Fire Controllers on moving contraptions remain functional.
item.sentrymechanicalarm.fire_control_cl: -Entities in the list will be attacked
message.sentrymechanicalarm.whitelist_de: Attack all entities not on the list, including yourself
message.sentrymechanicalarm.whitelist_wa: Please remember to add yourself to the list
message.sentrymechanicalarm.blacklist_de: Only attack entities on the list
